title: helichrysum lanceolatum
intro: Helichrysum lanceolatum, also known as the Green Button or Rock Helichrysum, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum lanceolatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
